project: Fix SSE Agent Payload Normalization and Main-Character Ownership Handling
description: Normalize frontend agent payloads, restrict Star ownership to explicit main agents, and return an idle owner state from /status when no main agent exists.

userStories.title: Audit normalization and ownership code paths
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to identify the exact frontend and backend entry points for payload normalization, main-agent selection, and /status fallback so that follow-on tasks change the correct minimal surfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Implementation notes identify the frontend function or block used for initial snapshot agent normalization
Implementation notes identify the SSE handling path for agent_join and agent_update payloads
Implementation notes identify the function responsible for selecting the main agent from the state snapshot
Implementation notes identify the backend /status fallback path used when no main agent exists
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Frontend initial snapshot normalization currently happens in frontend/game.js:getOfficeAgentsFromStateSnapshot(), which maps state.agents entries before reconcileOfficeAgentsFromPayload(). SSE agent_join and agent_update payloads currently normalize in frontend/game.js:parseSSEAgentPayload(), then flow through parseSSEEventPayload() into applyOfficeAgentStreamEvent(). Main-agent selection from a snapshot currently happens in frontend/game.js:getMainAgentPayloadFromStateSnapshot(). The backend /status idle fallback path currently lives in src/ui-routes.ts inside registerUIRoutes(), where the /status handler picks the first online agent, then the first available agent, and only falls back to idle when no agents exist.

userStories.title: Create a shared frontend agent normalization path
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single normalization path for backend agent payloads so that snapshot rendering and SSE updates apply the same field mapping rules.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/game.js contains one reusable normalization function for backend agent payloads
Initial snapshot processing calls the shared normalization function
SSE agent_join and agent_update processing call the same normalization function
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `normalizeBackendAgentPayload(rawAgent, options)` in `frontend/game.js` and routed both `getOfficeAgentsFromStateSnapshot()` and `parseSSEAgentPayload()` through it. Snapshot-specific label, auth-status, and timestamp derivation now layer on top of the shared normalizer via callback options, while SSE `agent_join` and `agent_update` keep using the same canonical field mapping entry point.

userStories.title: Prefer alias over name for normalized agent labels
userStories.description: As a user, I need normalized agent payloads to prefer alias before name so that the office UI shows the backend-provided visible identity.
acceptanceCriteria: A payload with alias "Lobster-1" and a missing or generic name normalizes to visible name "Lobster-1"
A payload with both alias and name prefers alias for the normalized visible name
A payload without alias still falls back to name for the normalized visible name
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated `frontend/game.js:normalizeBackendAgentPayload()` to prefer a non-empty backend `alias` before `name` when no source-specific override is supplied, which brings SSE `agent_join` and `agent_update` payload normalization in line with snapshot rendering. Added `test/frontend-normalization.test.mjs` to assert alias-first normalization, name fallback when alias is absent, and the shared SSE event parsing path for both incremental agent events.

userStories.title: Map online state into authStatus when absent
userStories.description: As a user, I need frontend presence normalization to derive authStatus from online when authStatus is missing so that online and offline agents do not render as pending by default.
acceptanceCriteria: A normalized payload with online true and no authStatus resolves to the existing online or active frontend auth state
A normalized payload with online false and no authStatus resolves to the existing offline frontend auth state
A payload that already includes authStatus preserves the explicit backend authStatus value
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated `frontend/game.js:normalizeBackendAgentPayload()` so missing `authStatus` now derives from boolean `online` (`approved` when true, `offline` when false) before falling back to `pending`. Added frontend regression coverage for online-true, online-false, and explicit-authStatus precedence.

userStories.title: Apply normalized presence data to office agent rendering
userStories.description: As a user, I need the office rendering path to consume normalized names and auth state so that labels, opacity, and status indicators stay consistent between snapshots and live updates.
acceptanceCriteria: An agent normalized from online true without authStatus renders at full opacity
An agent normalized from online true without authStatus shows the online or green status indicator
An agent normalized from online false without authStatus renders as offline rather than pending
The same backend payload values produce the same visible name and presence styling in snapshot rendering and subsequent SSE updates
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Restrict main-agent selection to explicit isMain payloads
userStories.description: As a user, I need main-character selection to return a main agent only when isMain is true so that guest agents cannot take over the Star character or owner status.
acceptanceCriteria: getMainAgentPayloadFromStateSnapshot returns no main-agent payload when no agent in the snapshot has isMain true
getMainAgentPayloadFromStateSnapshot returns the payload for the agent marked with isMain true when one exists
Online guest agents without isMain true are excluded from main-agent selection
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Keep guest movement updates separate from Star ownership
userStories.description: As a user, I need guest agents to keep moving based on their activity while the Star character remains idle when no main agent exists.
acceptanceCriteria: A guest agent with a non-idle state such as writing still updates to the expected office location
The same guest activity update does not change the Star character animation when no main agent exists
The owner status bar remains in idle-owner behavior when only guest agents are present
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Return an idle owner payload from /status without a main agent
userStories.description: As a user, I need the backend /status route to emit an idle owner response when no tracked agent is marked as main so that the frontend owner UI does not mirror a guest agent.
acceptanceCriteria: When no tracked agent has isMain true, /status returns an idle owner state payload
When no tracked agent has isMain true, /status returns detail text "Waiting..."
When no tracked agent has isMain true, /status does not mirror the first online guest agent
Existing /status behavior for a valid main agent remains unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add frontend regression tests for normalization and no-main ownership
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automated frontend coverage for normalized payload handling and main-agent selection so that alias, presence, and Star ownership regressions are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover alias-first normalization for agent_join and agent_update payloads
Automated tests cover online true and online false fallback mapping when authStatus is absent
Automated tests cover the no-main-agent path where getMainAgentPayloadFromStateSnapshot returns no main-agent payload
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend regression tests for /status idle fallback
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automated backend coverage for the /status no-main-agent fallback so that guest agents cannot silently become the reported owner again.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover the /status idle fallback when no tracked agent has isMain true
The no-main-agent test verifies detail text "Waiting..."
Automated tests verify that /status continues returning the existing owner payload when a valid main agent exists
Typecheck passes
